title: Citrusy Crunchy German Lemon Grass Stir-fry
description: A refreshing weeknight meal that combines the brightness of lemongrass with the crunchiness of pickled vegetables and a touch of lemon zest for an extra citrus kick, perfect as a side dish or light main course.

ingredients.name: Pickled vegetables (e.g. gherkins or pickled carrots)

instructions: Wash the lemon grass thoroughly, cut off any hard parts, then finely chop it.
In a wok or large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add lemon grass to the wok and stir for another minute.
Gently fold in pickled vegetables and sprinkle with Chinese white pepper if using. Stir well.
Season with salt, black pepper, and fresh lemon zest. Mix thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are evenly coated with flavors.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the mixture is heated through and the pickles are just tender but still crisp.
Serve hot as a side dish or garnish over noodles.
